title: NZ Family Holiday Budget Planner 2026 — Cost Calculator
description: Calculate exactly what your NZ family holiday will cost. Pick your destination, accommodation type, family size and trip length — get instant low, mid, and premium estimates with a full cost breakdown.
meta_desc: Free NZ family holiday cost calculator. Pick destination, accommodation type, family size and nights — get instant budget, mid-range and premium estimates for 2026 prices.
html_content:
Pick your destination, accommodation, family size, and trip length — get a full cost breakdown with budget, mid-range, and premium estimates. Covers 12 popular NZ family destinations.

Calculate my trip cost →
